description: Direct Lithium Extraction with 72-hour offline cache. Survives multi-day dust storms without satellite uplink.
challenge: A standalone extraction module operates in a remote salt flat. A multi-day dust storm obstructs solar capacity and blocks the satellite uplink for 72 hours. Standard gateways drop data after 2 hours.
response: VITO switches telemetry to 'Store-and-Forward' mode, caching all sensor data locally. Power Manager sheds non-essential containers to preserve battery. Data bursts to HQ when connectivity returns.
result: Zero data loss. Zero downtime. Zero human intervention. Full compliance audit trail maintained.
